thanks-desc: Le wóphila wóičhikȟoyake kiŋ káǧe: wóyutȟokča, wóeye na táku uŋmá kiŋ philáwičayapi.
thanks-error-undefined: Wópȟila eyákiya oyákihi šni (wóglušna wóiyawa: $1). Akȟé iyutȟa {{GENDER:|yo|ye|yo/ye}}.
thanks-error-invalid-log-id: Wówa-égnakapi mahél wóeye kiŋ le iyéyaya oyákihi šni
thanks-error-log-deleted: Wówa-égnakapi wóeye kiŋ le iháŋgyapi, he uŋ wóphila eyáya oyákihi šni.
thanks-error-revdeleted: Wóphila eyáya oyákihi šni ičhíŋ wóyutȟokča kiŋ iháŋgyapi.
thanks-error-notloggedin: Tuwa čhažé-wanílya uŋ kiŋ wóphila eyá-phiča šni
echo-pref-tooltip-edit-thank: Tuwá wóphila émakiyá kiŋháŋ, he omakiyake.
notification-header-rev-thank: $1 $3 el táku {{GENDER:$4|lutȟókeča}} kiŋ {{GENDER:$2|waštélake}} he uŋ wóphila éničiye.
notification-header-creation-thank: $1 $3 el táku {{GENDER:$4|yakáǧa}} kiŋ {{GENDER:$2|waštélake}} he uŋ wóphila éničiye.
notification-header-log-thank: $1 $3 el táku {{GENDER:$4|ečhánuŋ}} kiŋ {{GENDER:$2|waštélake}} he uŋ wóphila éničiye.
notification-bundle-header-rev-thank: {{PLURAL:$1|Tuwá waŋží|Tuwáwa $1}} $2 el táku {{GENDER:$3|lutȟókeča}} kiŋ {{PLURAL:$1|waštélake|waštélakapi}} he uŋ wóphila {{PLURAL:$1|eníčiye|eníčiyapi}}.
notification-bundle-header-log-thank: {{PLURAL:$1|Tuwá waŋží|Tuwáwa $1}} $2 el táku {{GENDER:$3|ečhánuŋ}} kiŋ {{PLURAL:$1|waštélake|waštélakapi}} he uŋ wóphila {{PLURAL:$1|eníčiye|eníčiyapi}}.
log-description-thanks: Léčhiya tuwáwa wóphila ičúpi kiŋ owá égnakapi.
thanks-error-no-id-specified: Wóphila eyáya yačhiŋ ehaŋtáŋš, takomni wóyutȟokča ID naíŋš wówa-égnakapi ID yakáȟniǧe.
thanks-confirmation-special-log: Wóečhuƞ kiŋ le ogná wóphila owíčhotaya eyáya yačhíŋ he?
thanks-confirmation-special-rev: Wóyutȟokča kiŋ le ogná wóphila owíčhotaya eyáya yačhíŋ he?
flow-thanks-confirmation-special: Wóeye kiŋ le ogná wóphila owíčhotaya eyáya yačhíŋ he?
notification-header-flow-thank: $1 "$3" el wóeye {{GENDER:$5|nitȟáwa}} {{GENDER:$2|waštélake}} he uŋ wóphila éničiye.
notification-bundle-header-flow-thank: {{PLURAL:$1|Tuwá waŋží|Tuwáwa $1}} "$2" el wóeye {{GENDER:$3|nitȟáwa}} {{PLURAL:$1|waštélake|waštélakapi}} he uŋ wóphila {{PLURAL:$1|eníčiye|eníčiyapi}}.
